basic_details.job_title: ISRO ISTRAC Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 26 Technician, Technical Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: ISRO Telemetry Tracking and Command Network (ISTRAC), Bengaluru
basic_details.post_name: Technician-B (Electronics Mechanic), Technician-B (Carpenter), Draughtsman-B (Civil), Draughtsman-B (Mechanical), Technical Assistant (Electronics), Technical Assistant (Mechanical), Scientific Assistant (Computer Science), Scientific Assistant (Mathematics), Library Assistant 'A', Cook-A
basic_details.short_information: The ISRO ISTRAC Bharti 2026 is a central government recruitment drive under the Department of Space, Government of India. Positions span technical, scientific, and support roles across ISTRAC and its associated facilities including MCF Hassan, SDSC SHAR, and stations across the Andaman and Nicobar Islands. All posts are temporary and stationed at various ISRO locations across India.

age_limit.details: Each post under the ISRO ISTRAC Recruitment 2026 has distinct educational qualification and experience requirements. The age limit for most posts is 18 to 35 years as on 13 July 2026, while Cook-A falls under a different pay level structure. Candidates must verify the specific qualification requirements for each post code carefully before applying. | The age limit is calculated as on 13 July 2026. Candidates wondering about age relaxation for reserved categories should note that standard government age relaxation norms apply for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD candidates as per Government of India rules.

qualification.details: Each post under the ISRO ISTRAC Recruitment 2026 has distinct educational qualification and experience requirements. The age limit for most posts is 18 to 35 years as on 13 July 2026, while Cook-A falls under a different pay level structure. Candidates must verify the specific qualification requirements for each post code carefully before applying.

vacancy_details.Category Details: ST-01-identified to be posted at NESAC, Umiam. salary_details.details: Selected candidates under ISRO ISTRAC Vacancy 2026 will receive consolidated gross emoluments as per the 7th Pay Commission Pay Matrix. The pay level varies by post, ranging from Level 2 for Cook-A to Level 7 for Technical and Scientific Assistants and Library Assistant. All applicable central government allowances are admissible in addition to basic pay. | Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

faq.question: Q1. What is ISRO ISTRAC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: ISRO ISTRAC Recruitment 2026 refers to Advertisement No. ISTRAC-02:2026 issued by ISRO Telemetry Tracking and Command Network, Bengaluru, under the Department of Space, Government of India. It covers 26 vacancies across 10 post codes including Technician-B, Draughtsman-B, Technical Assistant, Scientific Assistant, Library Assistant, and Cook-A.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for ISRO ISTRAC Vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for ISRO ISTRAC Recruitment 2026 is 20 July 2026 at 5:00 PM. The online application window opened on 27 June 2026. No offline applications are accepted.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in ISRO ISTRAC Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 26 vacancies are available across 10 post codes. The largest single vacancy group is Technician-B (Electronics Mechanic) with 55 posts, followed by Technical Assistant (Electronics) with 35 posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for ISRO ISTRAC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts is 18 to 35 years as on 13 July 2026. Standard government age relaxation applies for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD candidates as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the qualification for Technician-B in ISRO ISTRAC?
faq.answer: Candidates must have SSC/SSLC/Matriculation plus an ITI/NTC/NAC certificate in the relevant trade from NCVT. For Post Code 001 (Electronics Mechanic), the trade must be in Electronics Mechanic, Technician Power Electronic Systems, Mechanic Consumer Electronics, Electronic Appliances, or Mechanic Industrial Electronics.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for ISRO ISTRAC Technical Assistant?
faq.answer: Technical Assistant posts (Post Codes 005 and 006) are at Pay Level-7 with approximate gross emoluments of Rs. 54,800/- per month plus admissible allowances as per 7th Pay Commission norms.

faq.question: Q7. Where will selected candidates be posted under ISRO ISTRAC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Posting locations vary by post code and include ISTRAC Bengaluru, MCF Hassan, NSRAC, Andaman and Nicobar Islands, SDSC SHAR (Andhra Pradesh), and Thiruvananthapuram. Candidates should verify the specific posting location for each vacancy before applying.

faq.question: Q8. Is there an application fee for ISRO ISTRAC Apply Online 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification (ISTRAC-02:2026) does not mention any application fee. Candidates should verify on the official application portal at www.isro.gov.in or www.istrac.gov.in before submitting the application.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for ISRO ISTRAC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify the detailed selection process steps, but ISRO typically conducts a written test followed by a skill test or interview depending on the post. Candidates are advised to monitor the official ISRO and ISTRAC websites for updates on the selection schedule.

faq.question: Q10. What experience is required for the Cook-A post in ISRO ISTRAC 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for Cook-A (Post Code 010) must have SSLC/SSC pass or equivalent and a minimum of 2 years' experience as a cook in a well-established hotel or canteen. Experience certificates from individuals will not be accepted — only institutional certificates are valid.
